language.subtitle: You can change this anytime in Settings

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your account to continue.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Start tracking your real net pay today.
auth.confirmationSent: We sent a confirmation link to

auth.errorEmailPassword: Please enter your email and password.
auth.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.guestMode: Explore the app without an account →

fuel.title: What's your weekly fuel spend?
fuel.subtitle: Your best guess is fine — you can update this anytime.
fuel.label: WEEKLY FUEL COST
fuel.hint: Think about your last few fill-ups

expenses.title: What are your monthly expenses?
expenses.subtitle: Fill in the ones that apply, then add anything else. The more accurate, the better your break-even rate.
expenses.fixedHint: Fill in the ones that apply to you. Leave the rest blank.
expenses.otherHint: Permits, tolls, subscriptions — anything else you pay for.
expenses.emptyHint: Tap "+ Add Expense" to get started

miles.title: How many miles per week?
miles.subtitle: We'll calculate your monthly miles from this.
miles.label: WEEKLY MILES

result.title: Your break-even rate
result.subtitle: Accept loads that pay MORE than this to make a profit.
result.nudge: Add your expenses and miles to calculate your break-even rate. You can do this anytime in the app.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.checkLoad: Check Load — Is This Worth It?
dashboard.noLoadsHint: Tap + to log your first load and see your real net pay.
dashboard.breakEvenUnit: per mile — below this you lose money

checkLoad.title: Check Load
checkLoad.subtitle: Find out if this load is worth taking.
checkLoad.noBreakEven: Add your expenses and miles in setup to get an accurate break-even verdict.

fuel.title: Fuel
fuel.noEntriesHint: Every fill-up updates your real cost-per-mile.

form.title: Log Fuel Entry
form.odometerHint: Last recorded: {{miles}} mi — {{driven}} miles since last fill-up
form.odometerFirst: First entry — odometer will be tracked from here
form.saveError: Could not save fuel entry. Please try again.
form.missingInfo: Please enter amount spent, gallons, and your current odometer reading.
form.checkAmount: A single fill-up over $2,000 seems unlikely. Please double-check the amount.
form.checkGallons: Over 500 gallons seems unlikely. Please double-check.
form.checkOdometerHigh: Odometer reading over 2,000,000 miles seems unlikely. Please double-check.
form.checkOdometerLow: Your last recorded reading was {{miles}} mi. New reading must be higher.

scan.chooseMessage: Take a photo or choose one from your library
scan.scannedHint: Scanned — double-check the values below before saving.
scan.permissionMsg: Allow camera and photo access to scan receipts.
scan.notAvailableMsg: Receipt scanning isn't available yet. Enter the values manually.
scan.failedMsg: We couldn't read that receipt. Try a clearer photo or enter the values manually.

fuel.heroAvg: Avg of your last {{count}} fill-ups · Updated {{date}}
fuel.heroBaseline: First fill-up sets your odometer baseline — log your next fill-up to see your cost per mile
fuel.heroEmpty: Log a fill-up to see your real cost per mile

addLoad.title: Add Load
addLoad.routeError: Couldn't auto-calculate — enter miles manually above.
addLoad.missingInfo: Enter the load pay and miles to continue.

photo.chooseMessage: Take a photo or choose one from your library
photo.permissionMsg: Allow camera and photo access to attach a BOL photo.

scanBol.hint: Scanned — review the details. We'll calculate the route automatically.
scanBol.failedMsg: We couldn't read that BOL. Try a clearer photo or enter the details manually.
scanBol.notAvailableMsg: BOL scanning isn't available yet. Enter the details manually.

ifta.title: IFTA
ifta.noDataHint: Log loads and fuel entries to auto-build your IFTA report.
ifta.disclaimer: Figures are estimates based on logged data. Verify all totals before filing your IFTA return.
ifta.exportFailedMsg: Could not open the share sheet.
ifta.lockedSub: See all {{count}} states + CSV export, ready for your accountant

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.heroEmpty: Enter your expenses and miles below to calculate

history.title: History
history.noLoadsHint: Every load you log will appear here with full profit breakdown.
history.hintSelectedDay: Tap another day on the calendar, or tap the X above to see all loads.
history.hintAllTime: Loads you log will appear here.
history.hintBrowse: Use the arrows above to browse other periods.

settings.title: Settings
settings.profileGuestSub: No account — data clears on restart
settings.weeklyMilesSub: Drives your fixed cost per mile
settings.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
settings.deleteAccountConfirm:
This will clear all local data and sign you out.

To permanently remove your account from our servers, email truckernet@novaboostlabs.co after signing out.
settings.replayConfirm: This will walk you through the setup flow again to update your break-even calculation.
settings.upgradeSub: Fair-market rates, IFTA, full history & more
